content: In the interstellar medium, molecular hydrogen (H₂) is the most abundant molecule. Other molecules like carbon monoxide (CO), water (H₂O), and various organic compounds are also present, but H₂ dominates the molecular content.
raw_content: In the interstellar medium, molecular hydrogen (H₂) is the most abundant molecule. Other molecules like carbon monoxide (CO), water (H₂O), and various organic compounds are also present, but H₂ dominates the molecular content.
